title: Pink Chikankari Anarkali Suit - Hand Embroidered Lucknowi Dress for Wedding, Pastel Anarkali for Festive Occasion, Custom Indian Ethnic Wear
description:
✨ Radiate timeless grace in this exquisite blush pink chikankari anarkali, a masterpiece of traditional artistry perfect for your next celebration. Whether you are seeking the perfect wedding guest outfit or a touch of elegance for a festive gathering, this ensemble promises a regal silhouette.

📦 Product Details:
- Material: Premium pure georgette
- Color: Soft blush pink
- Craft: Authentic Lucknawi chikankari hand embroidery
- Style: Traditional chikankari anarkali long dress with a flowy flare
- Size Range: XS to 3XL (custom sizing available for a bespoke fit)
- Occasion: Wedding, festive celebration, or formal Indian party wear

🧵 About the Craft: This hand embroidered Lucknowi suit set is meticulously handcrafted by skilled artisans in the heart of Lucknow, India. Using age-old techniques passed down through generations, every delicate thread is woven to perfection, making this georgette anarkali a true heirloom piece that celebrates the rich heritage of Indian ethnic wear.

🌍 Shipping & Sizing Info: We ship worldwide with care, ensuring your garment arrives in pristine condition. Unsure about your size? We offer custom tailoring to ensure your pink chikankari anarkali for wedding events fits like a dream. Please refer to our size guide or send us your measurements for a personalized fit.

💌 We are here to help you shine! If you have any questions regarding this pastel pink indian designer anarkali or need assistance with your order, please reach out via Etsy messages—we would love to help you find your perfect boho indian dress.
